UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE LE AND WILLIAM LES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE WHETHER LOAN CONTRACTS WERE WRITTEN AND TO ALLEGE ALL ESSENTIAL TERMS OF THE CONTRACTS/ ATTACH THE CONTRACTS; AND (2) TO ALLEGE FACTS REGARDING "DELAYED DISCOVERY." FOX V. ETHICON ENDO-SURGERY, INC (2005) 35 CAL.4TH 797. DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1112(A)(3) AND SFLR 2.6C IN FUTURE. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK N. BAUTISTA, NOT REPORTED, (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Set For Trial On Jun-16-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Stanley Shen (415-661-6700) appearing for Defendants and moving party/ No other apperances.

Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE LE and WILLIAM LES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE to AMEND for Plaintiff to allege whether loan contracts were written and to allege all essential terms of the contracts/ attach the contracts; and (2) to allege facts regarding "Delayed Discovery." Fox v. Ethicon Endo-Surgery, Inc (2005) 35 Cal.4th 797. Defendants and their counsel are ordered to comply with CRC 3.1112(a)(3) and SFLR 2.6C in future. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Continued To Sep-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE LE, WILLIAM LE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on September 16, 2013, at 9:30 a.m. See SF Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
